Corncob Design Language AI usage rules

- Use only Corncob classes and vanilla HTML and JavaScript.
- Default layout system: corn-container, corn-row, and corn-col-*.
- Use the grid for page and section layout unless a component page documents a different internal layout.
- Start from canonical component code before adding enhancements.
- Preserve documented class names, child order, and required wrappers.
- For components with required internal structure, use the grid around the component instead of rewriting the inside.
- Check components.json for canonical examples, variants, sizes, and JS requirements.
- Check tokens.json for tokens and common patterns.
- Read /guides/ai-integration/ for the full contract.
